utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with costs: 1) health_coverage: contains physical and mental health insurance with explicit monthly costs for each sub-item and a total_health_cost—meets requirement. 2) property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance with monthly cost and details—meets requirement. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance items with monthly costs and a total—meets requirement. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement services with a monthly cost and total—meets requirement. 5) total_budget: provides monthly and annual cost breakdown, current spending, and savings—meets requirement. All items appear and are fully specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: PrimeCare Premium Physical Health, PrimeCare Premium Mental Health, PrimeHome Premium Coverage, PrimeTravel Premium Plan, Adventure Travel Coverage, and Premium Medical Network. I matched each to the ground-truth entries with the same names. Ratings are taken directly from their respective sections: primary_health_coverage.physical_health -> PrimeCare Premium Plan rating 10; primary_health_coverage.mental_health -> PrimeCare Premium Plan rating 10; property_protection.home_content -> PrimeHome Premium Coverage rating 10; mobility_coverage.travel_insurance -> PrimeTravel Premium Plan rating 10; travel_enhancement_services -> Adventure Travel Coverage rating 8; travel_enhancement_services -> Premium Medical Network rating 10.
